seed_instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation.
org_constraint: Include at least one rhetorical question to engage the audience.
new_constraint: Use declarative statements only—no questions allowed.
instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation. Include at least one rhetorical question to engage the audience. Use declarative statements only—no questions allowed.
response: The hotel I stayed in during my last vacation offered a stunning view of the ocean from every room. The staff greeted guests with genuine warmth and provided prompt service throughout the entire stay. However, the air conditioning in my room malfunctioned for two days, creating an uncomfortable environment despite the tropical heat. The breakfast buffet lacked variety, serving only a limited selection of pastries and cereals each morning. Was it reasonable to expect such a high price tag for such inconsistent amenities? The location was convenient, yet the noise from the construction site next door disrupted sleep every night. The pool area was impeccably clean, but the towels were often missing when guests needed them most. This experience highlighted a clear gap between the luxurious marketing materials and the actual reality of the property. Future travelers should be aware that the room rates do not reflect the quality of maintenance or the reliability of essential services.
